headline: Prediction: 1 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Quietly Double While the Market Panics Over TurboQuant
summary: The launch of Google's TurboQuant has fueled a nasty sell-off in artificial intelligence (AI) memory and storage stocks.

headline: Micron: I Was Wrong, This Time Is Indeed Different (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Micron (MU) upgraded to neutral as AI demand boosts revenue and margins; guidance sees tight DRAM/NAND supply. Read more macro analysis here.
